school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Either Dunn goes with 98%, or Frost goes with Liam — but not both.
93% goes with exactly two of Hale, Kira, and Period 2.
Boyd, Nash, and Period 6 go with 83%, 88%, and 93%, in some order.
Either 93% goes with Period 2 or 93% goes with Period 5.
78% goes with exactly two of Dunn, Noah, and Period 1.
Ellis' period is lower than both the class with Liam's period and the class with 93%'s period.
88% goes with neither Mona nor Period 3.
88%, 98%, and 103% go with Boyd, Dunn, and Quinn, in some order.
The class in Period 2's grade is between the class with Noah's grade and Hale's grade.
The class with Mona's grade is at least 10% away from Boyd's grade.
Boyd's period is between the class with Noah's period and the class with 103%'s period.
Dunn's period is lower than both the class with Quinn's period and the class with 83%'s period.

chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
